title: Everbuild Forever Anti-Mould, Superior Hygienic Silicone Sealant for Areas of High Humidity - White - 295ml (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Forever White is a superior silicone sealant that is permanently waterproof and flexible.
Ideal for sealing: shower bases and cubicles, wetrooms, around baths, sinks and basins.
It is also ideal for use in kitchens and utility rooms and for sealing around window and door frames.
Forever White is independently tested and certified by an accredited microbiological laboratory to show no mould growth after more than 10 years simulated ageing.
Forever White now also contains an Anti-Bacterial additive which kills germs.
description: From the manufacturer HOW TO APPLY? All surfaces to be sealed must be clean and dry. Always tool sealant down to ensure a proper bond is achieved. Tool within 15 minutes of applying. Fill bath half with water while sealing and curing to balance movement in plastic & acrylic baths. WHERE TO US IT? JOINTS ALWAYS IMMACULATE AND PROTECTED OVER TIME The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products.
